title: Kyiv monastery set on fire in night of Russian attacks across Ukraine
summary_full: Dormition Cathedral at Unesco world heritage site struck along with residential buildings across capitalEurope live – latest updatesA massive Russian missile and drone attack on Kyiv has badly damaged the Dormition Cathedral in the Pechersk Lavra monastery complex, a Unesco world heritage site and one of Ukraine’s most significant religious and cultural sites.Five people were killed in Kyiv, where waves of drones and missiles drove residents to underground shelters and heavy explosions echoed throughout the capital. Kyiv’s Oleksandr Dovzhenko national film studio, which houses Ukraine’s largest and oldest costume collection, was also hit. Continue reading...
